name: Konbu No Tsukukani (Pickled Seaweed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the Konbu and drain it. Boil with water and vinegar, then cook until soft, approximately 2 hours.
2. Add sugar, ginger, shoyu, and stir often to prevent sticking to the pan until the liquid is almost absorbed.
3. Add gourmet powder. Chill and serve.
